name: investment-analyst
description: End-to-end investment credit analysis pipeline for SBC Treasury. /company-analysis collects earnings sources (press release, supplement, 10-Q/10-K/20-F, transcript) in parallel via source-collector agents and produces a cited docx writeup via the analysis-writer agent using local PDF extraction (pymupdf4llm). /tearsheet injects the resulting writeup into Excel templates via COM and archives PDFs. /credit-report produces CreditSights-style HTML/DOCX reports with FRED macro context, D3 charts, and rating-anchored recommendations.
